summary: Deep testing of Gastos (Expenses) module with IGV Incluido feature. Fixed CRITICAL bug: POST /api/gastos was failing with 500 error because 'data.numero' attribute didn't exist in GastoCreate model. Added auto-generation of gasto numbers (GAS-YYYY-NNNNN format) and support for frontend's pagos array structure. All 11 backend tests pass. Frontend IGV calculations work correctly.

backend_api.GET /api/gastos: PASS - Returns list of expenses for empresa_id=6
backend_api.POST /api/gastos: PASS - Creates expense with auto-generated numero and handles pagos array
backend_api.GET /api/gastos/{id}: PASS - Returns expense details with lineas
backend_api.DELETE /api/gastos/{id}: PASS - Deletes expense (blocked if pago exists - expected behavior)
backend_api.GET /api/cuentas-financieras: PASS - Returns financial accounts for Pagos section
backend_api.GET /api/proveedores: PASS - Returns suppliers for proveedor selection

frontend_igv_calculations.IGV Incluido = TRUE (default): PASS - importe=118 -> Base Gravada=100.00, IGV=18.00, Total=118.00
frontend_igv_calculations.IGV Incluido = FALSE: PASS - importe=100 -> Base Gravada=100.00, IGV=18.00, Total=118.00
frontend_igv_calculations.Line IGV checkbox toggle: PASS - Unchecking moves amount to No Gravada field

frontend_form.IGV Incluido checkbox: PASS - Visible and checked by default
frontend_form.Form fields: PASS - Fecha, Moneda, Tipo Doc, Nº Documento, Proveedor/Beneficiario present
frontend_form.Detalle del Gasto section: PASS - Categoría, Descripción, Línea Negocio, Centro Costo, Importe, IGV checkbox
frontend_form.Pagos section (obligatorio): PASS - Cuenta selection, Medio pago, Monto, Referencia
frontend_form.Doc SUNAT, Base Gravada, IGV, No Gravada: PASS - Auto-calculate correctly based on IGV Incluido toggle
frontend_form.Create expense flow: PASS - Successfully created GAS-2026-00007 and GAS-2026-00008
frontend_form.View expense modal: PASS - Shows date, beneficiario, documento, detalle lines, subtotal, IGV, total
frontend_form.Delete expense: PASS - Blocked for paid expenses (expected behavior)

bug_fixed.root_cause: Backend tried to use 'data.numero' which doesn't exist in GastoCreate model. Also not handling the new 'pagos' array from frontend.
fix_applied: Added generate_gasto_number() function to auto-generate GAS-YYYY-NNNNN format numbers
Updated create_gasto to generate numero automatically using get_next_correlativo
Updated create_gasto to use frontend-provided base_gravada, igv_sunat, base_no_gravada values (which respect impuestos_incluidos)
Updated create_gasto to process data.pagos array instead of deprecated data.pagado/data.cuenta_financiera_id

critical_code_review_comments: Backend now correctly uses frontend-calculated base_gravada, igv_sunat values which respect the impuestos_incluidos toggle
Gasto deletion is blocked when pago exists - this is expected business logic
Test data created: GAS-2026-00007 (TEST_Proveedor_IGV_Incluido), GAS-2026-00008 (Test Proveedor UI) - both have associated pagos so cannot be deleted without first deleting the pago

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all IGV calculations and form functionality verified)

seed_data_creation: Created 2 test gastos (GAS-2026-00007, GAS-2026-00008) with associated pagos for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Gastos module fully tested with IGV Incluido feature. The POST /api/gastos endpoint was broken and has been fixed - now auto-generates numero and handles pagos array from frontend. Two test gastos exist in DB (empresa_id=6) with associated pagos - they cannot be deleted without first deleting the pago records. All IGV calculations verified: IGV Incluido=True means importe already includes IGV (divide by 1.18), IGV Incluido=False means IGV is added on top (multiply by 0.18).
